//: AgentArena match config. Copy to agentarena.config.json and edit. Keys starting with // are comments and are ignored by the engine.
//players: REQUIRED: 2 to 16 players. Each needs id, name and provider.

players.name: MiniMax M3

provider.//type: REQUIRED: one of anthropic | openai | google | ollama. Use openai + baseUrl for OpenRouter.
provider.//baseUrl: OPTIONAL: custom API endpoint. Set to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 for OpenRouter.
provider.//apiKey: OPTIONAL: overrides OPENAI_API_KEY env var. Prefer .env.

players.//systemPrompt: OPTIONAL: overrides the game-server prompt for this player.
players.//maxTokens: OPTIONAL: per-player output cap (overrides limits.maxTokensPerTurn). Keep low for expensive models.
players.//reasoningEffort: OPTIONAL: low|medium|high|off. Caps hidden thinking for hybrid models (MiniMax M3, DeepSeek V4). Not effective on Anthropic models — use verbosity instead.
players.//priceInputPerM: OPTIONAL: USD per 1M input tokens, for live cost display.

players.name: Claude Opus 4.8
players.//verbosity: OPTIONAL: low|medium|high. Maps to Anthropic output_config.effort via OpenRouter. This is the main speed knob for Claude 4.7+ (temperature and reasoningEffort are ignored on these models).

//mcpServer: REQUIRED: the MCP game server. Use transport stdio to launch a local process, or sse to connect to a URL.

mcpServer.//env: OPTIONAL: environment variables passed to the game server process.

//stateToolName: OPTIONAL: name of the tool the engine calls to read game state (default: get_state).
//limits: OPTIONAL: every field has a default, so the whole block can be removed.

limits.//maxDurationMs: OPTIONAL: wall-clock cap on total match duration (ms). Omit for no time limit.
